class.name: thermocator/ThermalDisplay
class.description: Visualizes a thermal heat map as a color-gradient overlay. Subscribes to a nav_msgs/OccupancyGrid topic published by the ThermalMapBuilder node.

class.name: thermocator/ThermalLayer
class.description: Applies thermal heat map data as cost values in the Nav2 costmap. High temperature zones receive lethal or inflated costs. Subscribes to a nav_msgs/OccupancyGrid published by ThermalMapBuilder.
